level_signals: 5+ years of Product Management experience required
Comp range $147,595–$210,850 base, consistent with Senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 5+ years of Product Management experience with a proven track record of driving revenue growth through product innovation.
You have experience shipping AdTech products, ideally advertiser-facing, and understand how they impact business value and user experience.
You are an autonomous product owner, capable of navigating complex stakeholder landscapes to ship advertiser-facing products.
You possess a deep curiosity or direct experience implementing generative AI within advertiser-facing workflows.
You have a technical understanding of how to build products and APIs that scale.
You're comfortable leading global product launches & experiments, and using data to drive decisions.

scope.surface: Spotify Ads Manager — self-serve advertiser platform (campaign creation, optimization, launch tooling, APIs)
scope.business_model: B2B self-serve advertising platform; revenue driven by advertiser spend on audio/video ad products
primary_metrics_inferred: Platform scale (hundreds of thousands of advertisers)
core_responsibilities: Build & launch products in the Spotify Ads Manager to drive advertiser revenue and improve ad performance
Leverage advertiser insights, lead data-driven experimentation, and navigate complex trade-offs to drive clear business impact and scale
Drive continuous product discovery and funnel optimization for the advertiser platform, directly influencing retention and long-term business growth
Implement AI tooling to build innovative and performant products with speed
Work cross-functionally with engineering, design, product insights and business partners
Create products and APIs which scale on our ads platform
Help develop a holistic ad strategy for the future of the Spotify Ads Business
Create a healthy and productive environment in your team through honesty, accountability, empathy and inclusivity

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed ($147,595–$210,850 base) plus equity
Remote-eligible across Americas region — broad geographic flexibility
Clear product surface and ownership (Spotify Ads Manager)
Generous benefits: 6-month paid parental leave, 23 paid days off, 13 flexible holidays
Explicit inclusivity and accessibility commitments including interview accommodations
red_flags: Work authorization and visa sponsorship not addressed anywhere in the JD
The 'ideally advertiser-facing' qualifier on AdTech experience softens what reads as a hard requirement — ambiguous how strictly this will be evaluated
No information on team size or reporting structure
Location says 'Americas region' but no specific cities or countries listed, leaving geographic eligibility partially unclear

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title + comp + years requirement)
seniority.manages_people (inferred as false; no people management language in JD)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly in JD)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred as false; no differential mentioned)
ambiguities: AdTech product experience: JD says 'ideally advertiser-facing' which normally indicates a nice-to-have, but the sentence also contains hard-sounding language ('You have experience shipping AdTech products'). Classified as hard with the 'ideally advertiser-facing' qualifier noted.
Generative AI requirement says 'deep curiosity OR direct experience' — threshold is deliberately low but still listed in 'Who You Are' unconditional section, classified as hard.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship: not stated anywhere; left as 'unclear'.
Geographic eligibility: 'Americas region in which we have a work location' — specific countries or cities not enumerated, making full eligibility unclear for non-US Americas candidates.
